Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0803 "REDHAWK-0400-0803" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3f sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Redhawk.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0400 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
